MCP setup commands:

commands.name: mcp serve
commands.description: Start the MCP STDIO proxy (alias: --mcp-app)

commands.name: mcp status
commands.description: Report installation state of MCP servers across clients

commands.name: mcp install
commands.description: Register MCP servers in client config files

commands.name: mcp uninstall
commands.description:
Remove MCP servers from client config files
MCP setup options:
<client>                         Target client (positional, or use --all-ides): copilot-vscode, copilot-vs, copilot-cli, cursor, windsurf, kiro, gemini-antigravity, gemini-cli, junie-rider, claude-code, claude-desktop, codex-cli, jetbrains-air, opencode, unknown
--workspace <path>               Workspace root (default: current directory)
--channel <stable|prerelease>    Select the Uno MCP definition channel
--tool-version <ver>             Pin the Uno MCP tool definition to a specific version
--servers <list>                 Comma-separated server names (default: all)
--all-scopes                     For mcp uninstall, remove matching registrations from every configured scope
--all-ides                       For mcp install/uninstall without <client>, target all detected clients
--dry-run                        Show what would be done without modifying any files
--json                           Emit JSON output
--ide-definitions <path>         Override embedded MCP client profiles
--server-definitions <path>      Override embedded server definitions
Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stop the DevServer for the current folder

commands.name: list
commands.description: List active DevServer instances

commands.name: disco
commands.description: Discover environment and SDK details

commands.name: health
commands.description:
Report Uno DevServer health for the current workspace
MCP setup commands:

commands.name: mcp serve
commands.description: Start the MCP STDIO proxy (alias: --mcp-app)

commands.name: mcp status
commands.description: Report installation state of MCP servers across clients

commands.name: mcp install
commands.description: Register MCP servers in client config files

commands.name: mcp uninstall
commands.description:
Remove MCP servers from client config files
MCP setup options:
<client>                         Target client (positional, or use --all-ides): copilot-vscode, copilot-vs, copilot-cli, cursor, windsurf, kiro, gemini-antigravity, gemini-cli, junie-rider, claude-code, claude-desktop, codex-cli, jetbrains-air, opencode, unknown
--workspace <path>               Workspace root (default: current directory)
--channel <stable|prerelease>    Select the Uno MCP definition channel
--tool-version <ver>             Pin the Uno MCP tool definition to a specific version
--servers <list>                 Comma-separated server names (default: all)
--all-scopes                     For mcp uninstall, remove matching registrations from every configured scope
--all-ides                       For mcp install/uninstall without <client>, target all detected clients
--dry-run                        Show what would be done without modifying any files
--json                           Emit JSON output
--ide-definitions <path>         Override embedded MCP client profiles
--server-definitions <path>      Override embedded server definitions
Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.

commands.description: Register MCP servers in client config files

commands.name: mcp uninstall
commands.description:
Remove MCP servers from client config files
MCP setup options:
<client>                         Target client (positional, or use --all-ides): copilot-vscode, copilot-vs, copilot-cli, cursor, windsurf, kiro, gemini-antigravity, gemini-cli, junie-rider, claude-code, claude-desktop, codex-cli, jetbrains-air, opencode, unknown
--workspace <path>               Workspace root (default: current directory)
--channel <stable|prerelease>    Select the Uno MCP definition channel
--tool-version <ver>             Pin the Uno MCP tool definition to a specific version
--servers <list>                 Comma-separated server names (default: all)
--all-scopes                     For mcp uninstall, remove matching registrations from every configured scope
--all-ides                       For mcp install/uninstall without <client>, target all detected clients
--dry-run                        Show what would be done without modifying any files
--json                           Emit JSON output
--ide-definitions <path>         Override embedded MCP client profiles
--server-definitions <path>      Override embedded server definitions
Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.

Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.

commands.description: Start the MCP STDIO proxy (alias: --mcp-app)

commands.name: mcp status
commands.description: Report installation state of MCP servers across clients

commands.name: mcp install
commands.description: Register MCP servers in client config files

commands.name: mcp uninstall
commands.description:
Remove MCP servers from client config files
MCP setup options:
<client>                         Target client (positional, or use --all-ides): copilot-vscode, copilot-vs, copilot-cli, cursor, windsurf, kiro, gemini-antigravity, gemini-cli, junie-rider, claude-code, claude-desktop, codex-cli, jetbrains-air, opencode, unknown
--workspace <path>               Workspace root (default: current directory)
--channel <stable|prerelease>    Select the Uno MCP definition channel
--tool-version <ver>             Pin the Uno MCP tool definition to a specific version
--servers <list>                 Comma-separated server names (default: all)
--all-scopes                     For mcp uninstall, remove matching registrations from every configured scope
--all-ides                       For mcp install/uninstall without <client>, target all detected clients
--dry-run                        Show what would be done without modifying any files
--json                           Emit JSON output
--ide-definitions <path>         Override embedded MCP client profiles
--server-definitions <path>      Override embedded server definitions
Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.

commands.description: Start the DevServer for the current folder

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stop the DevServer for the current folder

commands.name: list
commands.description: List active DevServer instances

Report Uno DevServer health for the current workspace

commands.description: Discover environment and SDK details

commands.name: health
commands.description:
Report Uno DevServer health for the current workspace
MCP setup commands:

commands.name: mcp serve
commands.description: Start the MCP STDIO proxy (alias: --mcp-app)

commands.name: mcp status
commands.description: Report installation state of MCP servers across clients

commands.name: mcp install
commands.description: Register MCP servers in client config files

commands.name: mcp uninstall
commands.description:
Remove MCP servers from client config files
MCP setup options:
<client>                         Target client (positional, or use --all-ides): copilot-vscode, copilot-vs, copilot-cli, cursor, windsurf, kiro, gemini-antigravity, gemini-cli, junie-rider, claude-code, claude-desktop, codex-cli, jetbrains-air, opencode, unknown
--workspace <path>               Workspace root (default: current directory)
--channel <stable|prerelease>    Select the Uno MCP definition channel
--tool-version <ver>             Pin the Uno MCP tool definition to a specific version
--servers <list>                 Comma-separated server names (default: all)
--all-scopes                     For mcp uninstall, remove matching registrations from every configured scope
--all-ides                       For mcp install/uninstall without <client>, target all detected clients
--dry-run                        Show what would be done without modifying any files
--json                           Emit JSON output
--ide-definitions <path>         Override embedded MCP client profiles
--server-definitions <path>      Override embedded server definitions
Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.

commands.description: Register MCP servers in client config files

commands.name: mcp uninstall
commands.description:
Remove MCP servers from client config files
MCP setup options:
<client>                         Target client (positional, or use --all-ides): copilot-vscode, copilot-vs, copilot-cli, cursor, windsurf, kiro, gemini-antigravity, gemini-cli, junie-rider, claude-code, claude-desktop, codex-cli, jetbrains-air, opencode, unknown
--workspace <path>               Workspace root (default: current directory)
--channel <stable|prerelease>    Select the Uno MCP definition channel
--tool-version <ver>             Pin the Uno MCP tool definition to a specific version
--servers <list>                 Comma-separated server names (default: all)
--all-scopes                     For mcp uninstall, remove matching registrations from every configured scope
--all-ides                       For mcp install/uninstall without <client>, target all detected clients
--dry-run                        Show what would be done without modifying any files
--json                           Emit JSON output
--ide-definitions <path>         Override embedded MCP client profiles
--server-definitions <path>      Override embedded server definitions
Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List active DevServer instances

commands.name: disco
commands.description: Discover environment and SDK details

commands.name: health
commands.description:
Report Uno DevServer health for the current workspace
MCP setup commands:

commands.name: mcp serve
commands.description: Start the MCP STDIO proxy (alias: --mcp-app)

commands.name: mcp status
commands.description: Report installation state of MCP servers across clients

commands.name: mcp install
commands.description: Register MCP servers in client config files

commands.name: mcp uninstall
commands.description:
Remove MCP servers from client config files
MCP setup options:
<client>                         Target client (positional, or use --all-ides): copilot-vscode, copilot-vs, copilot-cli, cursor, windsurf, kiro, gemini-antigravity, gemini-cli, junie-rider, claude-code, claude-desktop, codex-cli, jetbrains-air, opencode, unknown
--workspace <path>               Workspace root (default: current directory)
--channel <stable|prerelease>    Select the Uno MCP definition channel
--tool-version <ver>             Pin the Uno MCP tool definition to a specific version
--servers <list>                 Comma-separated server names (default: all)
--all-scopes                     For mcp uninstall, remove matching registrations from every configured scope
--all-ides                       For mcp install/uninstall without <client>, target all detected clients
--dry-run                        Show what would be done without modifying any files
--json                           Emit JSON output
--ide-definitions <path>         Override embedded MCP client profiles
--server-definitions <path>      Override embedded server definitions
Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.

commands.name: mcp uninstall
commands.description:
Remove MCP servers from client config files
MCP setup options:
<client>                         Target client (positional, or use --all-ides): copilot-vscode, copilot-vs, copilot-cli, cursor, windsurf, kiro, gemini-antigravity, gemini-cli, junie-rider, claude-code, claude-desktop, codex-cli, jetbrains-air, opencode, unknown
--workspace <path>               Workspace root (default: current directory)
--channel <stable|prerelease>    Select the Uno MCP definition channel
--tool-version <ver>             Pin the Uno MCP tool definition to a specific version
--servers <list>                 Comma-separated server names (default: all)
--all-scopes                     For mcp uninstall, remove matching registrations from every configured scope
--all-ides                       For mcp install/uninstall without <client>, target all detected clients
--dry-run                        Show what would be done without modifying any files
--json                           Emit JSON output
--ide-definitions <path>         Override embedded MCP client profiles
--server-definitions <path>      Override embedded server definitions
Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.

commands.name: mcp install
commands.description: Register MCP servers in client config files

commands.name: mcp uninstall
commands.description:
Remove MCP servers from client config files
MCP setup options:
<client>                         Target client (positional, or use --all-ides): copilot-vscode, copilot-vs, copilot-cli, cursor, windsurf, kiro, gemini-antigravity, gemini-cli, junie-rider, claude-code, claude-desktop, codex-cli, jetbrains-air, opencode, unknown
--workspace <path>               Workspace root (default: current directory)
--channel <stable|prerelease>    Select the Uno MCP definition channel
--tool-version <ver>             Pin the Uno MCP tool definition to a specific version
--servers <list>                 Comma-separated server names (default: all)
--all-scopes                     For mcp uninstall, remove matching registrations from every configured scope
--all-ides                       For mcp install/uninstall without <client>, target all detected clients
--dry-run                        Show what would be done without modifying any files
--json                           Emit JSON output
--ide-definitions <path>         Override embedded MCP client profiles
--server-definitions <path>      Override embedded server definitions
Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stop the DevServer for the current folder

commands.name: list
commands.description: List active DevServer instances

commands.name: disco
commands.description: Discover environment and SDK details

commands.name: health
commands.description:
Report Uno DevServer health for the current workspace
MCP setup commands:

commands.name: mcp serve
commands.description: Start the MCP STDIO proxy (alias: --mcp-app)

commands.name: mcp status
commands.description: Report installation state of MCP servers across clients

commands.name: mcp install
commands.description: Register MCP servers in client config files

commands.name: mcp uninstall
commands.description:
Remove MCP servers from client config files
MCP setup options:
<client>                         Target client (positional, or use --all-ides): copilot-vscode, copilot-vs, copilot-cli, cursor, windsurf, kiro, gemini-antigravity, gemini-cli, junie-rider, claude-code, claude-desktop, codex-cli, jetbrains-air, opencode, unknown
--workspace <path>               Workspace root (default: current directory)
--channel <stable|prerelease>    Select the Uno MCP definition channel
--tool-version <ver>             Pin the Uno MCP tool definition to a specific version
--servers <list>                 Comma-separated server names (default: all)
--all-scopes                     For mcp uninstall, remove matching registrations from every configured scope
--all-ides                       For mcp install/uninstall without <client>, target all detected clients
--dry-run                        Show what would be done without modifying any files
--json                           Emit JSON output
--ide-definitions <path>         Override embedded MCP client profiles
--server-definitions <path>      Override embedded server definitions
Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.

commands.name: disco
commands.description: Discover environment and SDK details

commands.name: health
commands.description:
Report Uno DevServer health for the current workspace
MCP setup commands:

commands.name: mcp serve
commands.description: Start the MCP STDIO proxy (alias: --mcp-app)

commands.name: mcp status
commands.description: Report installation state of MCP servers across clients

commands.name: mcp install
commands.description: Register MCP servers in client config files

commands.name: mcp uninstall
commands.description:
Remove MCP servers from client config files
MCP setup options:
<client>                         Target client (positional, or use --all-ides): copilot-vscode, copilot-vs, copilot-cli, cursor, windsurf, kiro, gemini-antigravity, gemini-cli, junie-rider, claude-code, claude-desktop, codex-cli, jetbrains-air, opencode, unknown
--workspace <path>               Workspace root (default: current directory)
--channel <stable|prerelease>    Select the Uno MCP definition channel
--tool-version <ver>             Pin the Uno MCP tool definition to a specific version
--servers <list>                 Comma-separated server names (default: all)
--all-scopes                     For mcp uninstall, remove matching registrations from every configured scope
--all-ides                       For mcp install/uninstall without <client>, target all detected clients
--dry-run                        Show what would be done without modifying any files
--json                           Emit JSON output
--ide-definitions <path>         Override embedded MCP client profiles
--server-definitions <path>      Override embedded server definitions
Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.

commands.description: Start the MCP STDIO proxy (alias: --mcp-app)

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start the DevServer for the current folder

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stop the DevServer for the current folder

commands.name: list
commands.description: List active DevServer instances

commands.name: disco
commands.description: Discover environment and SDK details

commands.name: health
commands.description:
Report Uno DevServer health for the current workspace
MCP setup commands:

commands.name: mcp serve
commands.description: Start the MCP STDIO proxy (alias: --mcp-app)

commands.name: mcp status
commands.description: Report installation state of MCP servers across clients

commands.name: mcp install
commands.description: Register MCP servers in client config files

commands.name: mcp uninstall
commands.description:
Remove MCP servers from client config files
MCP setup options:
<client>                         Target client (positional, or use --all-ides): copilot-vscode, copilot-vs, copilot-cli, cursor, windsurf, kiro, gemini-antigravity, gemini-cli, junie-rider, claude-code, claude-desktop, codex-cli, jetbrains-air, opencode, unknown
--workspace <path>               Workspace root (default: current directory)
--channel <stable|prerelease>    Select the Uno MCP definition channel
--tool-version <ver>             Pin the Uno MCP tool definition to a specific version
--servers <list>                 Comma-separated server names (default: all)
--all-scopes                     For mcp uninstall, remove matching registrations from every configured scope
--all-ides                       For mcp install/uninstall without <client>, target all detected clients
--dry-run                        Show what would be done without modifying any files
--json                           Emit JSON output
--ide-definitions <path>         Override embedded MCP client profiles
--server-definitions <path>      Override embedded server definitions
Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.

commands.description: Stop the DevServer for the current folder

commands.name: list
commands.description: List active DevServer instances

commands.name: disco
commands.description: Discover environment and SDK details

commands.name: health
commands.description:
Report Uno DevServer health for the current workspace
MCP setup commands:

commands.name: mcp serve
commands.description: Start the MCP STDIO proxy (alias: --mcp-app)

commands.name: mcp status
commands.description: Report installation state of MCP servers across clients

commands.name: mcp install
commands.description: Register MCP servers in client config files

commands.name: mcp uninstall
commands.description:
Remove MCP servers from client config files
MCP setup options:
<client>                         Target client (positional, or use --all-ides): copilot-vscode, copilot-vs, copilot-cli, cursor, windsurf, kiro, gemini-antigravity, gemini-cli, junie-rider, claude-code, claude-desktop, codex-cli, jetbrains-air, opencode, unknown
--workspace <path>               Workspace root (default: current directory)
--channel <stable|prerelease>    Select the Uno MCP definition channel
--tool-version <ver>             Pin the Uno MCP tool definition to a specific version
--servers <list>                 Comma-separated server names (default: all)
--all-scopes                     For mcp uninstall, remove matching registrations from every configured scope
--all-ides                       For mcp install/uninstall without <client>, target all detected clients
--dry-run                        Show what would be done without modifying any files
--json                           Emit JSON output
--ide-definitions <path>         Override embedded MCP client profiles
--server-definitions <path>      Override embedded server definitions
Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.

commands.description: Discover environment and SDK details

commands.name: health
commands.description:
Report Uno DevServer health for the current workspace
MCP setup commands:

commands.name: mcp serve
commands.description: Start the MCP STDIO proxy (alias: --mcp-app)

commands.name: mcp status
commands.description: Report installation state of MCP servers across clients

commands.name: mcp install
commands.description: Register MCP servers in client config files

commands.name: mcp uninstall
commands.description:
Remove MCP servers from client config files
MCP setup options:
<client>                         Target client (positional, or use --all-ides): copilot-vscode, copilot-vs, copilot-cli, cursor, windsurf, kiro, gemini-antigravity, gemini-cli, junie-rider, claude-code, claude-desktop, codex-cli, jetbrains-air, opencode, unknown
--workspace <path>               Workspace root (default: current directory)
--channel <stable|prerelease>    Select the Uno MCP definition channel
--tool-version <ver>             Pin the Uno MCP tool definition to a specific version
--servers <list>                 Comma-separated server names (default: all)
--all-scopes                     For mcp uninstall, remove matching registrations from every configured scope
--all-ides                       For mcp install/uninstall without <client>, target all detected clients
--dry-run                        Show what would be done without modifying any files
--json                           Emit JSON output
--ide-definitions <path>         Override embedded MCP client profiles
--server-definitions <path>      Override embedded server definitions
Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.

commands.name: mcp uninstall
commands.description:
Remove MCP servers from client config files
MCP setup options:
<client>                         Target client (positional, or use --all-ides): copilot-vscode, copilot-vs, copilot-cli, cursor, windsurf, kiro, gemini-antigravity, gemini-cli, junie-rider, claude-code, claude-desktop, codex-cli, jetbrains-air, opencode, unknown
--workspace <path>               Workspace root (default: current directory)
--channel <stable|prerelease>    Select the Uno MCP definition channel
--tool-version <ver>             Pin the Uno MCP tool definition to a specific version
--servers <list>                 Comma-separated server names (default: all)
--all-scopes                     For mcp uninstall, remove matching registrations from every configured scope
--all-ides                       For mcp install/uninstall without <client>, target all detected clients
--dry-run                        Show what would be done without modifying any files
--json                           Emit JSON output
--ide-definitions <path>         Override embedded MCP client profiles
--server-definitions <path>      Override embedded server definitions
Note: MCP setup options choose the expected Uno MCP definition.
Any dnx --prerelease or dnx --version written to config files is derived output.
